Gemini4J 0.0.2 API

Gemini4J

Gemini4J is a powerful and easy-to-use Java library that simplifies interactions with Google's cutting-edge Gemini language models. This library provides a comprehensive set of tools for developers to seamlessly integrate advanced language capabilities into their applications.

Key Features

  • Simplified API for interacting with Google's Gemini language models.
  • Support for a wide range of language model features, including:
    • Text generation
    • Question answering
    • Text embedding
    • Safety settings and content filtering
  • Integration with Google's Semantic Retriever API for advanced grounding and context retrieval.
  • Refer to the project's GitHub page for detailed documentation and examples.

    • License

    Gemini4J is licensed under the Mozilla Public License 2.0 (MPL-2.0). This license allows you to:

    • Use Gemini4J in commercial and non-commercial projects.
    • Modify the source code of Gemini4J.

    However, the MPL-2.0 also requires that:

    • Any modifications you make to the Gemini4J source code must also be licensed under the MPL-2.0.
    • You must make the source code of your modified version of Gemini4J available to others under the MPL-2.0.

    This ensures that Gemini4J remains open and accessible to the community, while still allowing for its commercial use.

    Developers

    • Everson Novka - enovka@gmail.com

    Packages 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.client.builder
    Provides classes for building GeminiClient instances.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.client.exception
    Provides exception classes specific to the Gemini API.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.client.imp
    Provides implementations for the GeminiClient interface.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.client.spec
    Provides specifications and interfaces for the Gemini client.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
    Provides domain classes representing objects of the Gemini API.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.request
    Provides classes representing requests to the Gemini API.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.response
    Provides classes representing responses from the Gemini API.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type
    Provides enums representing data types of the Gemini API.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.example
    Provides example code for using the Gemini4J library.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.exception
    Provides exception classes related to HTTP communication.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.factory
    Provides classes for building HttpClient instances.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.impl
    Provides implementations for the HttpClient interface.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.spec
    Provides specifications and interfaces for the HTTP client.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.json.builder
    Provides classes for building JsonService instances.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.json.exception
    Provides exception classes related to JSON serialization and deserialization.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.json.impl
    Provides implementations for the JsonService interface.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.json.spec
    Provides specifications and interfaces for the JSON service.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.tool
    Provides common utilities and base classes for the Gemini4J library.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder
    Provides classes for building resource instances.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl
    Provides implementations for Gemini API resource interfaces.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec
    Provides specifications and interfaces for Gemini API resources.
